title: About the advice we release - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā kōrero e pā ana ki ngā tohutohu ka tukuna

## About the advice we release
Information about the reports and advice our ministers have considered
- Withholding grounds under the Official Information Act 1982

## Search our library #
Advice seen by our ministers
The Ministers of Education receive a wide range of advice from us when they make decisions across the education sector.
Some of these decision-making processes will take longer than others. This means that some materials delivered to the ministers may be about items that stay under active consideration and take longer for us to share.
When we are able to, we release these documents with some lines removed according to the Official Information Act. See the list of withholding grounds below.
Once a month, we release copies of relevant policy advice that has been considered by Ministers and is not subject to further decisions.

## Withholding grounds under the Official Information Act 1982 #
- Section 6(a) to avoid prejudice to the security, defence, or international relations of New Zealand.
- Section 9(2)(a) to protect the privacy of natural persons.
- Section 9(2)(b)(ii) to protect the commercial position of the supplier of the information.
- Section 9(2)(ba)(i) to protect information which is subject to an obligation of confidence where making the information available would likely prejudice the supply of similar information.
- Section 9(2)(ba)(ii) to protect information which is subject to an obligation of confidence where making the information available would likely damage the public interest.
- Section 9(2)(f)(iv) to protect the confidentiality of advice tendered by Ministers of the Crown and officials.
- Section 9(2)(g)(i) to maintain the effective conduct of public affairs through the free and frank expression of opinion.
- Section 9(2)(h) to maintain legal professional privilege.
- Section 9(2)(j) to avoid prejudice to negotiations.
In preparing this information release, the Ministry of Education has considered the public interest considerations in section 9(1) of the Official Information Act.
Official Information Act 1982 – New Zealand Legislation

## Accessible formats #
Documents are available in Adobe PDF format only. Accessible versions, where available, can be supplied on request.
Email: enquiries.national@education.govt.nz
